name: consulting agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For consulting agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, budget tracking issues cause cash flow gaps. We provide project accounting software instead of manual spreadsheets and generic accounting software.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking budgets and generating timely financial reports.
